text:
The Hunter × Hunter Animate Cafe, shortened to Hunter × Animate Cafe (ハンター×アニメイトカフェ, Hantā × Animeito Kafe), is a collaboration between Animate Cafe and the Hunter × Hunter series. To date there have been 10 Animate Cafes for the series from 2018 to 2024.

Information

The Animate Cafe collaborates with popular anime and game franchises. For each collaboration, the interior is specially decorated and offers unique menu items and limited edition merchandise. DECOTTO by Animate Cafe is a take-out shop by Animate Cafe that also does collaborations and sells original donuts.

There are several Animate Cafe locations and a specific collaboration may only be available at one or more of those locations. Cafe reservations can be made online, or you can walk in to purchase the limited edition merchandise. Point cards are also distributed after purchases, and the customer can receive a special collaboration card as a gift for every two stamps collected.
